name: 揭露型（真相炸彈）
description: 用簡短有力的陳述揭露隱藏的關鍵信息，每一句都推翻觀眾或角色的認知。套路是先鋪墊疑問，再用一句話炸開真相。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: Lu Jianqing is the police's undercover agent in Xinghui / That girl is Wang Mingxiu's adopted daughter / No wonder I couldn't find her whereabouts / Turns out she was hidden in the Wang family

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: My mother created products always putting people first. The real culprits behind the toxic face cream case were the E family, father and daughter. / She's already Yuchen's wife. She's our family's granddaughter-in-law now.
examples.context: 製造震撼，推動劇情高潮
